Subject: Action Needed — Medical Waiver for [Player Name]

Hi [First Name],

The waiver submitted for [Player Name] didn't come through usably and we need a new one. Please print the attached form, fill it out by hand, and give it to your coach at the first practice.

These forms live in a Ziplock bag at the bottom of the team's ball bucket — quick access for the coach if something happens and you're not there.

If you in some way interacted with the digital signature field (as I did), that was likely the issue — it caused most of the page to render as a black block.

Thanks for taking care of it.

John Shikella
Registrar
